label: Pricing Table
description: Subscription pricing plan comparison cards with feature lists and CTA buttons. Displays 2-4 tiers side by side. Use for SaaS pricing, membership plans, service tier comparisons. Layout: side-by-side cards with plan name, price+period, feature list, and CTA button. Featured plan gets accent border and 'Recommended' badge.

test_data.heading: Simple, Transparent Pricing
test_data.subheading: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Upgrade or downgrade at any time.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Perfect for individuals and small projects.

10 GB Storage

Basic Analytics
API Access
